name: perforce
description: Perforce version control as MCP tools — list opened files, sync, describe changelists, diff, etc.

fields.name: P4PORT
fields.label: Perforce server
instructions: Or just host:port for non-SSL connections.

fields.name: P4DEPOT
fields.label: Depot path (without leading slashes)
instructions: The depot path your workspace lives under, without the leading //.

fields.name: P4PASSWD
fields.label: Perforce password (optional)
instructions: Leave empty if you have a cached p4 ticket (recommended).
Only paste here if you want the bridge to auto-login on startup.
Bridge will use this to run 'p4 login' on first start, then rely on the ticket.

errorHints.Connect to server failed: P4PORT might be wrong, or server unreachable. Check the address and your network/VPN.
errorHints.Your session has expired: Run 'p4 login' manually to refresh your ticket, or set P4PASSWD.
errorHints.User * doesn't exist: P4USER doesn't match an account on this server. Check spelling/case.
errorHints.Client * unknown: P4CLIENT doesn't exist on this server. Create the workspace first or use an existing one.
